title: Creator Pack
description: This assembly contains mods, textures and shaders to suit your taste. You can also add your own mods, textures and shaders if you are missing something.
body: This assembly contains mods, textures and shaders to suit your taste. Record a replay and animate the camera flyby using the **Flashback** mod. After that you can add texture packs or shaders from those available. If what is already there is not enough for you, then you can download something of your own.
